images.alt:
A moody, painterly landscape unfolds beneath a vast sky heavy with dark gray storm clouds. Rolling hills in muted gold, tan, and brown stretch across the scene, their contours softened by brushstroke-like textures that give the image the appearance of an oil painting. Near the center sits a small cluster of whitewashed cottages gathered tightly together in a shallow valley. Above them, isolated on a windswept hill, stands a solitary stone church with a simple bell tower, overlooking the countryside like a silent sentinel.
In the foreground, a weathered standing stone rises from dry grasses beside a low stone wall that snakes through the landscape. Near the right edge of the image, several figures gather around a small bonfire. Their faces appear pale and mask-like against the surrounding darkness. One figure in a long black coat stands with their back turned toward the viewer, facing the group. The others seem partially hidden by smoke and shadow, creating uncertainty about who they are or what role they play in the gathering.
The muted earth tones, distant settlement, lonely church, and mysterious ritual scene combine to create an atmosphere of isolation and unease. The landscape feels ancient, as though old beliefs still linger in the hills long after the rest of the world has moved on. The image evokes folk horror traditions, where ordinary rural settings conceal unsettling customs and forgotten histories.
Keywords:
folk horror, standing stone, hillside church, ritual gathering, rural village, storm clouds, moorland landscape, bonfire, masked figures, oil painting, gothic countryside, ancient tradition

images.alt:
Two young children stand in the center of what appears to have once been a playroom and is now a spectacular monument to unsupervised creativity. Both wear oversized toy goggles and wild, frizzled white wigs that make them resemble tiny mad scientists caught in the middle of an experiment gone catastrophically right. The child on the left wears a blue Batman shirt splattered with paint and art supplies, staring directly toward the camera with an expression that balances innocence and mild surprise. The child on the right wears yellow round glasses beneath a second pair of goggles perched on their head, their dark shirt and white shorts covered in colorful smears of paint.
The wooden floor is almost entirely hidden beneath crumpled paper, shredded stuffing, discarded tissues, art supplies, and colorful scribbles. Sheets of paper covered in energetic crayon drawings lie scattered across the room. Tufts of fluffy material, bits of craft debris, and streaks of paint create a visual trail of escalating mischief from foreground to background.
Behind them, a large black chalkboard wall is covered with chalk writing, symbols, arrows, stars, and mysterious pseudo-scientific notes that suggest either a groundbreaking discovery or a complete collapse of reality. Shelves along one wall overflow with markers, paints, and craft materials, while a colorful portrait painting hangs on the right side. Sunlight streams in from a nearby window, illuminating the chaos with almost cinematic warmth. The overall scene captures the exact moment a parent realizes that silence was not a sign of good behavior but a warning that something legendary was underway.

AI-generated; use is permitted for non-commercial creative projects. MidJourney, FLUX.1-schnell model via Perchance, Artspace.ai, REVE, Echoform™.

images.alt:
A cinematic horror movie poster depicts two unsettling mascot-like killers standing side by side in front of an inferno. The figure on the left wears a filthy white plush costume with small horns on the hood and a weathered hockey-style mask covering the face. The costume is stained with grime and dark splashes of blood, and the character grips a large knife while staring forward through hollow black eyeholes. Beside them stands a second figure wearing a tattered crimson coat and an oversized wooden box mask painted with a crude black smile and dark circular eyes. Red horn-like protrusions emerge from the top corners of the box. This character carries a massive blood-smeared cleaver held upright in one hand while another oversized blade hangs at their side.
Behind them, flames consume what appears to be an amusement park or carnival setting. A partially visible sign reading “Happy Playland” emerges from the smoke and fire near the lower left corner. Burning debris, twisted structures, drifting sparks, and glowing embers fill the background. The ground is wet and reflective, mirroring the orange and red firelight beneath the characters’ feet. Across the top of the poster, white and blood-red lettering reads, “They came to make friends. And everyone was invited.” The title, The Playdate, dominates the bottom portion in large jagged red letters resembling fresh paint or dripping blood, creating the look of a theatrical slasher film advertisement.

horror, slasher, mascot killer, amusement park, fire, blood, movie poster, cleaver, mask, inferno, dark fantasy, cinematic

It is made from a thin piece of metal, usually steel, bent into a looped shape with two curved ends that can be easily pressed together to hold papers securely. Paperclips come in various sizes, colors, and designs, and they are widely used in offices, schools, and homes as a convenient way to organize and file papers. The paperclip was invented in the late 19th century and has since become one of the most common and useful office

images.alt: First-person perspective from floor level inside a vast ceremonial fox-temple. A fox-eared priestess stands directly over the viewer, looking down with one eyebrow subtly raised and a calm, knowing expression that suggests equal parts patience, amusement, and inevitability. Her hands rest firmly on her hips, posture strong and balanced, conveying authority without hostility. She wears flowing dark crimson and gold ritual garments adorned with delicate chains and filigree accents. Long black hair falls around her shoulders, catching shafts of warm golden light descending from above. Her stance is grounded and confident, one leg slightly forward, creating the impression that the viewer has just ended up exactly where she expected them to. The camera angle emphasizes her height and presence, while the background remains softly blurred: towering banners, warm torchlight, hints of temple architecture, and faint fox motifs. The focus remains entirely on the priestess herself—her gaze, posture, and expression communicating a silent, almost compassionate: "Well... what did you think was going to happen?"

record.text:
Geiko is Toshimana.

Photo by Photographer name/撮影者名.

(licensed CC BY-SA 2.0)

55maiko.net

images.alt:
This vertical photograph from 55maiko.net captures an intimate and serene portrait of the geiko Toshimana seated gracefully on a traditional tatami floor. The composition utilizes a beautifully shallow depth of field, framing the subject between the soft-focused wood of an architectural pillar in the left foreground and a classic gridded shōji paper screen in the background. The gentle, natural lighting illuminates her porcelain-white makeup and pristine attire, creating a quiet, poetic atmosphere that epitomizes the refined elegance of Kyoto's traditional arts.

Toshimana is seated in a formal posture, her body turned slightly to the right while her gaze drifts thoughtfully off-camera to the left. Her face is flawlessly painted in traditional oshiroi makeup, accented by sharp, elegant black eyeliner, red-tinted brows, and perfectly defined crimson lips. Her raven hair is sculpted into a voluminous, structured katsura (traditional geiko wig), adorned with a subtle tortoiseshell hair ornament pinned near the top. In her right hand, she delicately holds an open, pale pink folding fan (sensu), its slender bamboo ribs radiating outward to mimic the soft contours of her face and chest.

Her attire is a beautiful display of understated elegance, featuring a brilliant off-white or light cream silk kimono. Draped loosely over her shoulders, the plain upper bodice of the robe gives way to a delicate, hand-painted seasonal motif near the hem, showcasing soft pastel clusters of pink and light blue hydrangeas (ajisai) on slender green stems. A glimpse of a contrasting pink under-layer and a warm gold obi sash peek out around her waist, adding depth to the ivory ensemble.

- Pick one work task like drafting an email or summarizing data
- Write one clear prompt with specific context
- Run it 3 times and compare what comes out
- Notice how similar the results actually are

Once you see the pattern, you'll realize the AI isn't the problem. Structured prompts bring structure to the output too. Focus on consistency in your inputs and the AI's reliability goes way up. That's the reality most people are missing. (3/4)

record.bridgyOriginalText:
For work tasks, this matters a lot. Teams that draft emails, build reports, or plan campaigns using the same prompt template get predictable results. The trick is being consistent.

So before you blame the AI, check if your prompt changed even slightly between runs. Small wording changes lead to big output differences. Give it the same prompt 3 times. You'll probably see more consistency than you expected.

## Quick Consistency Test (2/4)

external.description: Puregold Price Club has partnered with GCash for Business to broaden access to end-to-end digital financial tools for sari-sari store owners across the Philippines. The initiative aims to simplify payments, enable real-time transaction tracking, and provide merchants with secure and scalable digital solutions. Through the collaboration, merchants can use GCash for Business tools such as PocketPay, which turns an NFC-enabled smartphone into a POS terminal, and centralized portals to manage transactions and supplier transfers without prohibitive fees. On-site demonstrations and onboarding support help store owners set up digital payment capabilities quickly, enabling them to accept a wider range of payment options and enhance customer service. The TNAP ecosystem, including the TNAP Convention by Puregold, serves as a focal point for training and adoption, reinforcing the goal of empowering micro and small enterprises to compete effectively in a digitized marketplace. This partnership underscores a broader push toward financial inclusion and digital literacy among small retailers in the country, with the objective of boosting sales, operational efficiency, and resilience amid evolving consumer behaviors.

Trump Purchases UFC Stock While Promoting White House Birthday Event

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Users: It's clickbait ⚠️

#trump #ufc #conflictofinterest 

View full AI summary:

external.description: President Donald Trump has purchased between $15,001 and $50,000 in stock of TKO Group Holdings, the parent company of the Ultimate Fighting Championship (UFC), coinciding with his promotion of a White House event tied to the company. The event, set for June 14 on the South Lawn to celebrate Trump's 80th birthday, will feature UFC fights and 4,000 front-row seats. Trump has actively promoted the event, including hosting UFC fighters in the Oval Office and beginning construction of support structures for the fights. Critics, such as Jordan Libowitz of Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington, have called this a serious conflict of interest, stating that using the White House to benefit a company in which the president owns stock represents a direct financial gain from his official position. Trump has a history of buying and selling millions of dollars in stocks from companies he promotes or regulates, though White House officials and Vice President JD Vance claim that he does not personally manage these investments. The story raises ethical concerns about the intersection of presidential promotion and personal financial interests.
external.title: Trump Purchases UFC Stock While Promoting White House Birthday Event
